# Vendored libraries

## ROT.js 2.2.1

- Source: https://github.com/ondras/rot.js
- Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/rot-js
- License: BSD-3-Clause
- Local files: `rot-js/rot.min.js`, `rot-js/LICENSE.txt`

ROT.js supplies seeded random generation and dungeon-layout primitives for the Hohlgrund prototype.
